description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy resembling a bear, with a soft, knitted-texture exterior in a muted grayish-brown color. Its body is rounded and slightly chubby, with short, stubby arms and legs that are spread outward. The bear has a pair of rounded ears on top of its head and a small, triangular black nose. Its eyes are simple, round, and dark, giving it a gentle and neutral expression. A large, light blue patch is present on its belly, contrasting with the rest of its body. The overall appearance is cuddly and inviting, suitable for children or as a comforting object in an urban park or playground.
description: A soft, grayish-brown stuffed bear with a blue belly patch, rounded ears, and a gentle, neutral face. Its plush, knitted texture and chubby limbs make it appear cuddly and comforting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, rounded ears, black nose, and prominent blue belly patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bear's profile, rounded head, and the thickness of its body and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bear's head, body, and arms, with no facial features or belly patch visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bear's profile, similar to the left, with the blue belly patch partially visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with round, dark eyes and a small, triangular black nose. There is no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms and legs slightly spread outward, head facing forward.
